HOW_IT_WORKS.LABEL: How it works
HOW_IT_WORKS.TITLE: Simple from start to finish
HOW_IT_WORKS.STEP1_DESC: Build your poll in seconds with up to 6 options.
HOW_IT_WORKS.STEP2_DESC: Your poll instantly appears on the public board.
HOW_IT_WORKS.STEP3_DESC: See real-time results with elegant visualizations.
HOW_IT_WORKS.STEP4_DESC: After closing, analyze results and find out who won.
